flashcards.definition: Naturally occurring, inorganic solid with a definite chemical composition and crystalline structure.
Ranking minerals 1 (talc, softest) to 10 (diamond, hardest) based on scratch resistance.
The color of a mineral's powder when rubbed on unglazed porcelain; more reliable than surface color for ID.
The tendency of a mineral to break along flat, predictable planes determined by crystal structure.
How light reflects from a mineral's surface; classified as metallic or non-metallic (vitreous, pearly, earthy).
